pi_items.source: task.json description field line 5: 'Create a new folder named "Dev Tools" on the Favorites Bar'
Web search + task.json description. Metadata omits protocol but is functionally correct. Official URL confirmed as https://github.com
Web search + task.json description. Metadata omits protocol but is functionally correct. Official URL confirmed as https://stackoverflow.com
Web search confirms official Jenkins URL is https://www.jenkins.io. Task description line 5 explicitly specifies 'https://www.jenkins.io'. Metadata incorrectly omits 'www.' prefix and protocol.
task.json description: 'Configure Edge to open a specific page on startup: https://github.com'
task.json description: 'export your favorites to an HTML file named "initial_setup.html" in the /home/ga/Documents folder'

privileged_info_summary: Task is to configure Microsoft Edge for a developer workstation by creating a 'Dev Tools' folder on the Favorites Bar containing three bookmarks (GitHub, Stack Overflow, Jenkins), setting GitHub as the startup page, and exporting the configuration. The official website URLs are https://github.com, https://stackoverflow.com, and https://www.jenkins.io. The export file should be named 'initial_setup.html' and saved to /home/ga/Documents. One metadata error identified: the Jenkins URL is listed as 'jenkins.io' in metadata but should be 'www.jenkins.io' (the canonical official URL). Task uses real public websites (not synthetic data).
